mapper.insert:
/* PotholeDraftMapper.insertDraft - 임시 저장 데이터 저장 */ INSERT INTO pothole_draft ( status_cd, report_date, site_cd, receipt_gb_cd,
admin_site_cd,
direction_cd, lat, lng, accuracy_m, captured_at, captured_ts, addr, detail_info, delivery_note, writer_id, created_at, updated_at, weather_cd, temp, sta_meters, sta_km_decimal, sta_text ) VALUES ( 'DRAFT', #{reportDateTime}, #{siteCd}, #{receiptGbCd},
#{adminSiteCd},
#{directionCd}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{accuracyM},
#{capturedAt}
NULL
, #{capturedTs}, #{addr}, #{detailInfo}, #{deliveryNote}, #{writerId}, NOW(3), NOW(3), #{weatherCd},
#{temp} NULL ,
#{staMeters} NULL ,
#{staKmDecimal} NULL ,
#{staText} NULL
)
mapper.select: /* PotholeDraftMapper.selectDraftById - 임시 저장 데이터 조회 */ SELECT draft_id AS draftId, status_cd AS statusCd, report_date AS reportDateTime, site_cd AS siteCd, admin_site_cd AS adminsiteCd, direction_cd AS directionCd, lat, lng, accuracy_m AS accuracyM, captured_at AS capturedAt, captured_ts AS capturedTs, addr, detail_info AS detailInfo, delivery_note AS deliveryNote, writer_id AS writerId, weather_cd AS weatherCd, temp AS temp, sta_meters AS staMeters, sta_km_decimal AS staKmDecimal, sta_text AS staText, receipt_gb_cd AS receiptGbCd FROM pothole_draft WHERE draft_id = #{draftId}
